title: Mica
description: Enable Mica or Acrylic Material on Windows 11 21H2 22000 or later.
body: # Mica ### Enable Mica or Acrylic on Windows 11 21H2 (Build 22000) or later. ![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/LemonCaramel/Mica.svg) ![Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/LemonCaramel/Mica.svg) ![Tag](https://img.shields.io/github/tag/LemonCaramel/Mica.svg) ![Build status](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/LemonCaramel/Mica/mica-build.yml) ### Required Mods - **[YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)**: Required for setting changes. ### Preview
